meanings.open: When the authorized RFID card is presented and the medicine box is locked, the box will open.
meanings.locked: When the authorized RFID card is presented and the medicine box is open, the box will lock.
meanings.denied: An unauthorized RFID card is presented to the medicine box.
meanings.unusual_hours: The medicine box was opened outside its normal time periods.
meanings.high_access: The medicine box was opened more frequently than usual.

safety_anomalies_table.description: Summary of anomalies grouped by anomaly type and RFID card for a given date.

security_alert.description: Indicates current security state and last opened time of the medicine box.

security_logs_table.description: Logs every access attempt to the medicine box.

meanings.stable: No motion detected. Ideal transport conditions with zero risk.
meanings.moderate_vibration: Slight movement detected within acceptable limits. Medicine is safe.
meanings.high_vibration: High vibrations detected. Transport environment is unstable.
meanings.critical_vibration: Critical impact detected exceeding safety limits. Immediate inspection required.

risk_levels.low: Up to 20%: Smooth transportation, medicine likely in perfect condition.
risk_levels.medium: 20% to 60%: Several rough patches encountered, visual inspection recommended.
risk_levels.high: Above 60%: Significant mechanical stress, lab verification required before distribution.

vibration_alert.description: Status warning triggered by rough transport conditions such as potholes or sudden braking.
vibration_alert.location: Middle card in the left panel (Vibration section)

vibration_logs.description: Detailed log of motion events including time, net g, total g, and status.

vibration_risk_prediction.description: Predictive gauge indicating likelihood of medicine compromise during transport.
